note: DTD LOTTERY RECEIVED on the address detail panel now auto-hydrates from the diffs[] window — no need to open the DTD section first. The fetchInfo loop already fetches getblock for the latest 1000 blocks, so the lottery_payout / lottery_winner_address per block are now captured into diffs[] entries (lp / lw fields) and aggregated per winner address into window._dtdLotteryByAddr at the end of every fetch cycle (~6 s). Merges with the localStorage snapshot from any prior full DTD scan so all-time totals never regress when the rolling 1000-block window drops older wins. Showing 0 wins on a real winner (e.g. sost123d2c…8280 right after winning #7114) is now impossible — the row updates within one fetch cycle of the lottery block being fetched. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
